author: JanCzarnocki
text:
A Telegram bot trading Polymarket or Kalshi runs someone else's strategy on your money.

You hand over signing rights. The operator picks the trades. The chat says "position opened" and "position closed" with no rule you can read back. When it loses, you have a notification and a
